title: Rage Quit Origins
description: A Fabric modpack made for a group of friends, loosely based on the New Life SMP modpack.
body:
## 📝 Peach's Note

**Rage Quit Origins is a modpack loosely based on the New Life SMP pack, although it does not include the New Life Mod.**

The pack focuses on the Origins mod, in which an origin is assigned at random upon spawning and respawning, as well as the Create mod as the only form of technology. The pack invites individuals to venture outside their comfort zone (yeah, I'm looking at you Mekanism and Magic peeps) and focus on creating awesome-looking structures and industries in a wonderfully generted planet.

There are also seasons. Best wishes!

*Designed with love for fwendos :3*

## 🐱‍🚀 Role-Playing & Challenges

- Role-play your origin and try to theme your builds / activities / stores around that origin.
- Don't just reroll your origin. Try to stick it out for as long as you can.
- Come up with inovative ways to prank your friends and bait them into their own demise (without just straight up killing them. Unless they're stealing. Then maybe...
- If you aren't managing to die on your own, be creative in bringing about your own demise so you can move on. 
- Upon your respawn, try your best to start a new life. Yes you can use your already collected resources, tools, and gear. Moreso try and not live in the same house or area. 
- Collaborate with your friends of similar origins (for example, certain Nether creatures).
- Become enemies of your opposing origins (for example, Villagers and Pillagers).
- Be adventerous. Use the natural world and biomes to their advantage. 
- Build some awesome Create projects. 

## 📋 Mods List

- [**Acclaimed Origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/acclaimed-origins) - This origins addon adds 8 new origins into the game, these consist of the Goblin, Rat, Fire Born, Desperate, Underling, Riptider, Night Dancer and Obsidian Golem.
- [**Adapted Origins - An Origins Addon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/adapted-origins) - Adds several community-made Origins that I have revised and rebalanced. Requires Origins.
- [**Adorn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn) - Decorate your home!
- [**AfkDisplay**](https://modrinth.com/mod/afkdisplay) - Show which players are AFK in the player list. Fully configurable and with Placeholder API support.
- [**Alternate Current**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current) - An efficient and non-locational redstone dust implementation
- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods.

- [**CTOV - Villagers Plus Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctov-villagers-plus-compat) - Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and VillagersPlus mod
- [**CTOV - Waystone Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctov-waystone-compat) - Compatibility add-on for waystone mod and CTOV

- [**Create Track Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-track-map) - A web-based track map of your world's Create train system, complete with signals, stations, and trains moving in real time.
- [**CreativeCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - A core mod

- [**bad packets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets) - Bad Packets allows packet messaging between different modding platforms.

- [**way2wayfabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/way2wayfabric) - Waystone -> Xaero's Minimap Waypoint sync for fabric

## ❓ Who Dis?
### [ThePeachZA](https://cameronvarga.carrd.co/)
I am a student studying Media Studies in pursuit of being a full time event broadcaster, working in a studio.
My passion is to bring people together, and what a better way to do it than through capturing the moment.


### [Rage Quit](https://t.co/XcftkUBZTq)
Rage Quit is a community-driven South African esports organisation. Changing the game, one player at a time.
